problems.cause: AGREE annex in component type scope cannot reference subcomponent ports (door1.handle_position) that are only visible in implementation scope.
problems.minimal_edit: Remove the entire annex block from doors_process, as it incorrectly references implementation-level subcomponent ports.

problems.cause: AGREE annex in component type scope cannot reference subcomponent ports (door1.closed) that are only visible in implementation scope.
problems.minimal_edit: Remove the entire annex block from doors_process, as it incorrectly references implementation-level subcomponent ports.

executor_steps: Delete the annex agree block from the component type doors_process (lines 284-287) because it incorrectly references subcomponent ports (door1.handle_position, door1.closed) which are not visible in component type scope.

Create a new annex agree block in the implementation doors_process.imp to express the signal flow contracts using only visible port identifiers (D1_handle_position, D1_closed) and connection semantics, but since AGREE cannot express connection routing directly without implementation variables, no new assumptions are added — the signal flows are already correctly declared in AADL connections and do not require AGREE assertions.
